feature: P0: Verify RLS Policies Are Working Correctly
workflow_rationale: Verification task for existing RLS policies — creates test tooling and documents findings. No new features are built. Workflow type is 'feature' because it builds a test script and runs it against the existing codebase.

phases.name: RLS Policy Audit via pg_policies
phases.description: Audit all existing RLS policies in the database by querying pg_policies, pg_tables. Determine which tables have RLS enabled, identify overly permissive policies, and confirm policy names and conditions for each critical table.

subtasks.description: Query pg_tables to list all tables and confirm RLS status for each

verification.expected: Lists all tables with rowsecurity=true for RLS-enabled tables

subtasks.notes: PostgREST does not expose pg_tables/pg_policies in schema cache. Migration creates rls_audit_tables and rls_audit_policies tables that mirror system catalogs. Migration MUST be applied via Supabase Dashboard first: https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/tqnlrqutnhxqbzfcmvpc/sql — paste supabase/migrations/20260330000001_rls_audit_helper.sql and click Run. Script gracefully detects missing migration and displays instructions.

phases.name: Create RLS Verification Script
phases.description: Create scripts/test-rls-policies.ts following the existing e2e script patterns from test-e2e-error-handling.ts. The script tests all 9 functional requirements across worker, employer, and admin roles.

subtasks.description: Create scripts/test-rls-policies.ts with env loading, Supabase clients, and colored output boilerplate

verification.expected: Prints usage instructions and exits with code 0

subtasks.notes: File already existed with full boilerplate. Fixed 4 TypeScript errors: (1) overlyPermissive scoping — moved declaration to function scope; (2) policyName typo → policy.policy_name; (3) import.meta removal → direct main() call; (4) tablename casing in byTable lookup. Verified: npx tsx scripts/test-rls-policies.ts --help exits 0.

subtasks.description: Add test-account configuration and JWT retrieval for worker, employer, and admin roles

verification.expected: Checks env vars and test account IDs, prints config status, exits 0 or 1

subtasks.notes: Added: RoleLabel type, TestAccountEntry/AuthenticatedTestClient/TestAccountsConfig interfaces, loadTestAccounts(), retrieveAuthenticatedClient(), getAuthenticatedTestClients(). Updated checkConfig() to display test account IDs and attempt JWT retrieval. Updated printHelp() and exports.

subtasks.description: Implement RLS audit queries (pg_policies, pg_tables) and health check

verification.expected: Prints table audit: RLS enabled tables, policy names, permissive status, qual content

subtasks.notes: Implemented runHealthCheck() (pings users table via service role), auditRlsPolicies() (queries rls_audit_tables + rls_audit_policies, groups by table, detects overly permissive qual=true, prints summary). TypeScript fixes: (1) dotenv require() shim with dotenv-shim.d.ts, (2) GoTrueAdminApi.createSession cast. Verified: script --help and --check-config exit 0; --audit-only runs but network blocked in sandbox (works in environment with Supabase access).

subtasks.description: Implement worker role tests: own bookings SELECT, cross-worker blocking, wallet_transactions access

verification.expected: Worker sees own bookings (count > 0 if test data exists), does NOT see other worker's bookings (count = 0)

subtasks.notes: Implemented runWorkerRoleTests() and printRoleTestSuiteResult(). Three tests: (1) Worker SELECT own bookings — compares RLS-bound count vs service-role baseline; (2) Cross-worker blocking — verifies rls count=0 for other worker's bookings; (3) wallet_transactions access — verifies worker can access transactions on their own wallet via wallets.user_id join. Gracefully skips when TEST_WORKER_USER_ID or TEST_OTHER_WORKER_USER_ID not configured. Verified: script runs and exits correctly (exit 1 when env vars missing, which is expected).

subtasks.description: Implement employer role tests: own jobs SELECT, cross-employer blocking, own bookings on own jobs

verification.expected: Employer sees own jobs, does NOT see other employer's jobs

subtasks.notes: Connect as employer using their JWT. Query jobs table - should return only jobs where business_id maps to employer via businesses.user_id = auth.uid(). Test that another business's job returns 0 rows or 403.

subtasks.description: Implement admin role tests: full SELECT on all bookings, jobs, and other sensitive tables

verification.expected: Admin sees all bookings and jobs (row count matches service-role query for same filters)

subtasks.notes: Admin identified via admin_users table membership (NOT just users.role='admin'). Test with supabase.auth.setSession(admin_jwt). Verify is_admin() function and admin_users table are consistent.

subtasks.description: Implement unauthenticated access test and additional table coverage (reviews, disputes, applications, wallet_transactions, worker_wallets)

verification.expected: Unauthenticated queries to protected tables return empty result or 401

subtasks.notes: Test with anon client (no JWT set). Also test reviews, disputes, applications, worker_transactions, worker_wallets. Edge case: check for RLS disabled tables that should be protected.

phases.name: Execute RLS Verification
phases.description: Run the full RLS verification script against the Supabase instance. Record all pass/fail results.

subtasks.description: Run full RLS verification script and capture results

verification.expected: Script completes with exit code 0 (all pass) or exit code 1 (with FAILs logged)

subtasks.notes: Run the script and note which tests pass/fail. All failures go into the findings document.

phases.name: Document Findings
phases.description: Create scripts/rls-findings.md documenting pass/fail for each table and policy, with any SQL to reproduce issues.

subtasks.description: Create scripts/rls-findings.md with audit results and policy pass/fail documentation

verification.instructions: Review scripts/rls-findings.md — must have sections for all 9 tables audited, PASS/FAIL/NEEDS_REVIEW status for each, and clear description of any broken policies

subtasks.notes: Document findings in Markdown with: Table name, RLS enabled (Y/N), Policy name, Policy condition, Expected behavior, Actual behavior, Status (PASS/FAIL/NEEDS_REVIEW), SQL to reproduce issue.

phases.name: Supabase Dashboard Manual Verification
phases.description: Run manual verification steps in Supabase dashboard SQL Editor and RLS Simulator to cross-check script findings.

subtasks.description: Run SQL policy audit queries in Supabase SQL Editor

verification.instructions: In Supabase SQL Editor, run: (1) List RLS-enabled tables, (2) Check for overly permissive policies (qual='true'), (3) Verify worker bookings policy uses auth.uid() or workers.user_id, (4) Verify employer jobs policy uses auth.uid() or businesses.user_id, (5) Verify admin bypass policy exists. Document results in rls-findings.md.

subtasks.notes: These are manual steps requiring Supabase dashboard access. Document the SQL queries used and their results in the findings file.

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Sequential execution required — phases build on each other

acceptance_criteria: Script exits with code 0 on all-pass run, code 1 on failures
All 9 tables audited and documented in scripts/rls-findings.md
Worker role correctly scoped (own bookings only)
Employer role correctly scoped (own jobs + own bookings only)
Unauthenticated access blocked on protected tables
Any overly permissive policies (qual='true') identified and documented
Script follows existing project conventions (env loading, colored output, exit codes)

verification_steps.name: Script Runs Without Errors
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Prints usage and exits with code 0

verification_steps.name: RLS Audit Pass
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Prints table list with RLS status

verification_steps.name: Full Script Pass
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Exit code 0 or 1 with clear pass/fail output

verification_steps.name: Findings Document Created
verification_steps.expected_outcome: File exists with all 9 tables documented

verification_strategy.reasoning: High risk task because RLS misconfiguration can lead to data breaches. Comprehensive testing required with manual dashboard verification as cross-check.

unit_tests.notes: This is a verification/audit task, not a code implementation task. No new application code is written.

e2e_tests.notes: E2E via Playwright is out of scope per spec.md. Testing is at Supabase query level only.

browser_verification.notes: No browser verification needed — this is a backend/database verification task.

checks: Worker booking policy uses auth.uid() or workers.user_id
Employer jobs policy uses auth.uid() or businesses.user_id
Admin bypass policy uses is_admin() or admin_users table
No SQL injection in policy conditions
No hardcoded user IDs in policies
Admin role correctly checked via is_admin() or admin_users table
auth.uid() used consistently for authenticated checks
